name: Pumpkin Muffins 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place 24 paper baking cups in muffin tins.
3. Mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
4. In another bowl, mix eggs, skim milk, oil, pumpkin, and vanilla; add to bowl with dry ingredients. Stir until barely moistened.
5. Fold in raisins and walnuts and fill cups two-thirds full.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from tins and cool on a rack.
